base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should either create a small standalone call_wall_acceptance_long sample or prove the trigger is structurally unreachable. Desired result is at least 3 positive-expectancy call-wall trades with total net profit retained above 98% of run_044 and no deterioration in VALID_0DTE core profiles. Tradeoff is possible cannibalization of stronger charm/pullback entries if call-wall priority captures marginal acceptance states.
label: call-wall-sustained-sample-builder
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long. The current leader base is strong, but call_wall_acceptance_long remains enabled with zero trades, so its value cannot be estimated. This is a profile-specific sample-builder, not a global veto or missing-0DTE change. It differs from the recently rejected duplicate by using 60-second sustained acceptance and the lowest DEX grid, while preserving positive forward DEX and call-volume expansion confirmation.
